hero.role: I build things for the web & IoT.
hero.description: An Electronics and Instrumentation (UGM) student with a passion for developing innovative digital solutions, ranging from intuitive web interfaces to integrated IoT systems.

about.title: About
about.description: As a Software Engineer with dual expertise in hardware and software, I specialize in architecting scalable, high-impact systems. My portfolio encompasses building comprehensive ERP ecosystems (integrating POS, WMS, and complex cross-departmental purchasing flows), advanced IoT dashboards featuring RBAC, real-time map tracking, cross-gateway data analytics, and integrated Computer Vision, as well as crafting visually engaging e-commerce platforms. I translate complex business operations and technical requirements into seamless, user-centric digital solutions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Interested in working together or have a question? Feel free to reach out!
